title: E-Library Platform
shortDesc: A digital sanctuary for knowledge, managing 10k+ resources.

story.challenge: PDFs and digital resources were scattered and difficult for users to access on low-bandwidth connections.
story.solution: Developed a centralized hub with a custom previewing engine and optimized asset delivery.
story.result: Unified the resource management system and significantly improved accessibility for 5,000+ users.

title: Star Search Engine
shortDesc: Instant retrieval system for PDF data indexing.

story.challenge: Locating specific information within thousands of pages of PDF documents was nearly impossible manually.
story.solution: Implemented an indexing system using PDF.js to extract text and a fast search algorithm.
story.result: Search time dropped from minutes to milliseconds, making vast document sets easily searchable.

title: Offline Portfolio
shortDesc: A native-app experience for the web.

story.challenge: Static portfolios often fail when users have intermittent internet connectivity.
story.solution: Configured advanced service workers and background sync to ensure full offline functionality.
story.result: The portfolio is now fully available anytime, anywhere, boosting engagement in low-connectivity areas.

title: Jarvis Assistant
shortDesc: AI-powered assistant with deep system integration.

story.challenge: Standard assistants are often locked into specific ecosystems and lack local system control.
story.solution: Built a Python-based core that interacts directly with OS-level commands via voice and text.
story.result: A truly personal AI that can manage files, run scripts, and control the environment locally.
